title: Langeberg Mall - Best Shopping Centre in Mossel Bay for the second year running
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Langeberg Mall is proud to...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Langeberg Mall is proud to have once again been voted Best Shopping Centre in the Best of Mossel Bay Readers' Choice Awards 2025.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Langeberg Mall is proud to have once again been voted Best Shopping Centre in the Best of Mossel Bay Readers' Choice Awards 2025."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Winning this title for the second year in a row is an incredible honour – and it is thanks to the unwavering support of both our tenants and our shoppers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Perfectly located between Mossel Bay and Hartenbos, Langeberg Mall has become a favourite destination for locals and visitors alike.","html":"Perfectly located between Mossel Bay and Hartenbos, Langeberg Mall has become a favourite destination for locals and visitors alike."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With 105 tenants – including both national brands and over 30% small, privately owned businesses – our mall offers a unique shopping experience that blends convenience with local charm.","html":"With 105 tenants – including both national brands and over 30% small, privately owned businesses – our mall offers a unique shopping experience that blends convenience with local charm."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This past year has not been without its challenges, with ongoing roadworks in the surrounding area. Yet, despite the disruption, our loyal shoppers continued to visit, and our tenants continued to deliver outstanding service and products.","html":"This past year has not been without its challenges, with ongoing roadworks in the surrounding area. Yet, despite the disruption, our loyal shoppers continued to visit, and our tenants continued to deliver outstanding service and products."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For this, we extend our heartfelt thanks. Langeberg Mall remains committed to sustainability with our solar power installation, water-saving initiatives, recycling programmes, and EV charging stations.","html":"For this, we extend our heartfelt thanks. Langeberg Mall remains committed to sustainability with our solar power installation, water-saving initiatives, recycling programmes, and EV charging stations."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Add to that free undercover parking, family-friendly facilities and exciting promotions, and it’s clear why the community continues to choose us.","html":"Add to that free undercover parking, family-friendly facilities and exciting promotions, and it’s clear why the community continues to choose us."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thank you, Mossel Bay, for once again voting Langeberg Mall your best shopping destination!","html":"Thank you, Mossel Bay, for once again voting Langeberg Mall your best shopping destination!"},{"type":"list","items":["044 601 9801","www.langebergmallsa.co.za"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Langeberg Mall - Best Shopping Centre in Mossel Bay for the second year running
